name: ALIEN XENOBLASTER
short_description: Planet GOOBTOPIA's series of irresponsible decisions has led to a filthy wasteland polluting other planets in the solar system. Angry alien BLUNT has had enough in this arcade platformer-shooter.
detailed_description:
Planet GOOBTOPIA's series of irresponsible decisions has led to a filthy wasteland polluting other planets in the solar system. Angry alien BLUNT has had enough.

A kick-ass arcade themed game starring Blunt, a pissed off alien on her way to destroy a polluted planet and its obliviously lazy inhabitants. As she sets bait, battle your way through 6 worlds of content and lead Goobers to their doom...

WHAT'S THE GAMEPLAY LIKE?

Arcade themed platforming, climbing, and shootin'!

CONTENT!

- 6 World Campaign + Hard Mode

- 5 Bosses

- Cutscenes

- Endless Arcade Mode

- Challenge Mode

- Boss Rush

- 2-4 Player Local Co-op Mode

- Bonus Costumes & Characters

- Achievements

- Lots of FUN and COOL easter eggs

- the obligatory "and more"...
